---
title: "Download HiTOP-SR"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{download-hitopsr}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

You can download the files for the HiTOP-SR instrument below. Choose the format that best fits your research needs.

```{=html}
<div class="row mt-4">
  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h5 class="card-title">📄 Printable DOCX</h5>
        <p class="card-text text-muted">Use these Microsoft Word documents for printing, paper administration, or sending to the IRB.</p>
        <div class="d-grid gap-2">
          <a href="https://github.com/jmgirard/hitop/raw/main/inst/extdata/hitopsr_1.0_A4.docx" class="btn btn-outline-primary">Download A4</a>
          <a href="https://github.com/jmgirard/hitop/raw/main/inst/extdata/hitopsr_1.0_US.docx" class="btn btn-outline-primary">Download US Letter</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  
  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h5 class="card-title">📊 Qualtrics TXT</h5>
        <p class="card-text text-muted">Use this specially formatted text file to easily import the instrument directly into your Qualtrics surveys.</p>
        <div class="d-grid gap-2 mt-4">
          <a href="https://github.com/jmgirard/hitop/raw/main/inst/extdata/hitopsr_qualtrics.txt" class="btn btn-outline-primary">Download TXT</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  
  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h5 class="card-title">🏥 REDCap ZIP</h5>
        <p class="card-text text-muted">Use this compressed archive file to import the instrument as a new instrument in your REDCap project.</p>
        <div class="d-grid gap-2 mt-4">
          <a href="https://github.com/jmgirard/hitop/raw/main/inst/extdata/hitopsr_redcap.zip" class="btn btn-outline-primary">Download ZIP</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<br>
```

**Note:** If you need to recreate or customize these files (for example, to change the formatting or translate the text), you can use the [`generate_docx_hitopsr()`](../reference/generate_docx_hitopsr.html), [`generate_qualtrics_hitopsr()`](../reference/generate_qualtrics_hitopsr.html), and [`generate_redcap_hitopsr()`](../reference/generate_redcap_hitopsr.html) functions included in this package.
